# JavaDownloadToken Sample

This page is generated from the checked-in sample manifest at `config/samples/jmsjavadownloads_v1beta1_javadownloadtoken.yaml`.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Resource | `jmsjavadownloads/JavaDownloadToken` |
| API Version | `jmsjavadownloads.oracle.com/v1beta1` |
| Source Path | `config/samples/jmsjavadownloads_v1beta1_javadownloadtoken.yaml` |

```yaml
#
# Copyright (c) 2021, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
# Licensed under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 as shown at http://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl.
#

#
# Replace the compartment OCID and expiry before running e2e.
# The token value itself is sensitive and is intentionally not
# projected into status or docs after OCI returns it.
apiVersion: jmsjavadownloads.oracle.com/v1beta1
kind: JavaDownloadToken
metadata:
  name: javadownloadtoken-sample
spec:
  compartmentId: ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleuniqueID
  displayName: osok-java-download-token
  description: Java download token managed by OSOK
  timeExpires: "2030-01-01T00:00:00Z"
  javaVersion: "17"
  licenseType:
    - NFTC
  isDefault: false
  freeformTags:
    managed-by: oci-service-operator
```
